Goal: The main glass entrance of the sports complex
Instruction: Walk straight along the red brick sidewalk, keeping the large circular metal structure on your left. Follow the path as it curves slightly to the right, passing under the trees. Continue straight until you reach a crosswalk with a tall metal pole and a blue pedestrian sign. Cross the road and keep walking straight on the red brick path, passing a red and white striped barrier arm on your left. Step off the red brick path and onto the grey paved area of the parking lot. Walk straight through the parking lot, keeping the large modern building with a slanted roof and dark glass windows on your left. Head towards the entrance of this building. Stop in front of the main glass doors. You have arrived at your destination.
